headline: School Events
subheadline: Catch up on what's been happening across our campuses

events.title: Inter-Campus Sports Day
events.description: Learners from all three campuses came together for a day of athletics, team games, and friendly competition, ending with a prize-giving ceremony on the main field.

events.title: Grade 7 Science Expo
events.description: Our Grade 7 learners showcased independent science projects ranging from renewable energy models to plant biology experiments, judged by local STEM professionals.

events.title: Heritage Day Cultural Celebration
events.description: Learners and staff celebrated South Africa's diverse cultures with traditional dress, music, dance performances, and a multicultural food fair.

events.title: Parent-Teacher Evening
events.description: Parents and guardians met with class teachers to discuss term progress, with feedback sessions and a tour of the new computer lab.

events.title: Winter Reading Challenge Prize-Giving
events.description: Top readers from the Foundation and Intermediate Phases were recognised for completing the term's reading challenge, with new books awarded as prizes.

events.title: Annual Spring Fete
events.description: Our community fete featured stalls, games, live entertainment, and raised funds for new playground equipment. This event has now passed its display window.
